seoTitle: Lackrana vs Lake Leake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lackrana and Lake Leake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lackrana vs Lake Leake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lackrana and Lake Leake.
heading: Lackrana vs Lake Leake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lackrana, Tasmania and Lake Leake, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Leake has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lackrana (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lackrana or Lake Leake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lackrana has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Lake Leake scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lackrana scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Leake scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lackrana or Lake Leake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Leake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
